query_intent: For 2000 web sales with matching returns, compute reason-level averages of quantity, refunded cash, and return fee under matched refunded/returning demographic profiles and state/net-profit/price filters.

dag_nodes.intent: Join web sales, web returns, web page, two demographic roles, address, date, and reason; enforce OR-based marital/education/price clauses plus OR-based state/profit clauses; then aggregate reason-level averages.
